summary: Video. Coverage of Trump and dignitaries proceeding down the red carpet at the Beijing arrival ceremony, flanked by a military honor guard in traditional costume and Chinese young people waving flags. It has a high ambient music bed (music_score 0.93). It is continuous footage of a single ceremony with no montage editing, graphics, or stylized editing.
notable_text: Tweet: '.@POTUS proceeds down the red carpet in Beijing — briefly giving his signature fist pump to the assembled Military Honor Guard and Chinese youth flag wavers'
